song.title: My Song Shall Be of Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) My song shall be of Jesus; His mercy crowns my days, He fills my cup with blessings, And tunes my heart to praise. My song shall be of Jesus, The precious Lamb of God; Who gave Himself my ransom, And bought me with His blood.
[V2] 2) My song shall be of Jesus When, sitting at His feet, I call to mind His goodness In meditation sweet; My song shall be of Jesus, Whatever ill betide; I’ll sing the grace that saves me, And keeps me at His side.
[V3] 3) My song shall be of Jesus While pressing on my way To reach the blissful kingdom Of pure and perfect day; And when my soul shall enter That realm of splendor fair, A song of praise to Jesus I’ll sing forever there.
song.author: Fanny J. Crosby
